column3: An organised activity or campaign with a defined purpose, scope, ownership, and timeframe. In practice this may represent a research project, survey, or documentation campaign.
Document Note: Project Model Overview

This model defines a Project (E7) as a high-level activity used to group and manage related work (e.g., sampling campaigns, research initiatives, surveys). It brings together identifiers, title, ownership and participation, a short descriptive summary, dates/time-span, related documentation, and simple status/type flags. Projects may optionally sit within a broader parent project or programme.
The primary organisation or individual responsible for the project (Alternative labels: Responsible Institution or Person).
Other individuals or organisations involved in the project (Alternative labels: Contributors, Collaborators).
Documents associated with the project (Alternative labels: Reports, Publications, Proposals).
A broader project or programme within which this project is situated. Note: sometimes treated as E89 Propositional Object in other mappings, but can be implemented as E7 Activity in ResearchSpace.
